news.summary: A report on the AI Agents Market predicts significant growth from USD 5.29 billion in the current year to USD 216.8 billion by 2035, with a projected CAGR of 40.15% during this period. The report delves into the distribution by type of agent system, areas of application, type of agent role, type of technology, type of product, company size, and key geographical regions within the industry. This data has been compiled by ResearchAndMarkets.com and highlights the global trends and forecasts for the AI agents market up to 2035.
news.headline: Global AI agents market set to skyrocket from USD 5.29 billion to USD 216.8 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 40.15% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: In Seattle, the internet data company IPinfo unveiled IPinfo Lite, a novel data product offering free, enterprise-level information on country-specific IP geolocation and ASN data. Boasting daily updates and unrestricted usage, IPinfo Lite stands out for its high accuracy and absence of usage limits. This new launch sets a high bar for free IP address intelligence products, as many competitors provide inferior data quality and impose usage restrictions on their free offerings. IPinfo Lite also grants commercial rights, distinguishing it further from other similar products on the market.
news.headline: IPinfo launches IPinfo Lite: Unlimited country-level geolocation API & database download for free, with daily updates and no usage limits.

news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- NICE revealed Interactions 2025, the top customer experience (CX) event, happening from June 16-18 in Las Vegas. Attendees will receive guidance on leveraging AI and automation for customer service, backed by industry insights and best practices, for tangible outcomes. The event at Aria Hotel will feature an innovation showcase with over 50 live product demonstrations. NICE, listed on Nasdaq as NICE, aims to equip businesses with strategies to enhance their CX through the latest technologies and proven methods.
news.headline: NICE announces Interactions 2025 event with Kristen Bell keynote, to feature AI outcomes for customer service. Las Vegas event June 16-18.

news.summary: Camposol Holding PLC is scheduled to release its initial financial results for the first quarter of 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, May 27, 2025.
news.headline: Camposol Holding PLC to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 27, 2025, at 9:00 am ET.

news.summary: Camposol Holding PLC is set to reveal its first-quarter financial results for 2025 on Tuesday, May 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The CEO, Ricardo Naranjo Fernandez, and IRO, Jossue Yesquen Lihim, will be hosting a conference call presentation along with a Q&A session. Those interested in participating can register for the conference call using the link: https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIb9b889a825ee45bba7c0f4458dbb236d. Participants are advised to log in a few minutes prior to the start to check their audio and system settings. Additionally, there will be a webcast presentation available for access.
news.headline: Camposol Holding PLC to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 27 at 9am ET. CEO & IRO to host call. Register online.

news.summary: In Conshohocken, Pennsylvania on May 8, 2025, the GBS | CIDP Foundation International has kicked off a global campaign to mark Guillain-Barré Syndrome and Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy Awareness Month this May. The foundation aims to increase awareness of GBS, CIDP, and related conditions worldwide.
news.headline: GBS | CIDP Foundation International celebrates Awareness Month by launching global campaign in May to raise awareness of GBS, CIDP, and related diseases.

news.summary: The 2025 Q1 State of the Market Report for PJM highlights competitive outcomes in the wholesale electric energy market from January to March. Released in Eagleville, Pennsylvania on May 8, 2025, the report indicates positive performance within PJM Interconnection during this period. Key numbers include robust market activity levels and strong competition observed, reflecting a healthy market landscape.
news.headline: PJM wholesale electricity market competitive in Q1 2025 per report - EAGLEVILLE, Pa., May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Actors Sibil "Fox" and Robert "Rob" Richardson, known for their roles in the Oscar-nominated film TIME (2020), have announced a sequel with a unique release strategy. The new film aims to mobilize over 1 million viewers to engage in a movement towards justice and freedom. The announcement was made in New Orleans on May 8, 2025. The stars, Fox and Rob, are justice advocates who are leading the effort to encourage audiences to both watch the film and actively participate in the journey towards social change.
news.headline: Stars of Oscar-nominated TIME (2020) launch sequel "TIME II: Unfinished Business" with strategy to mobilize 1M+ for release on Juneteenth 2025.

news.summary: In Florida, a federal judge dismissed a majority of accusations against celebrities and social media influencers linked to the collapse of the cryptocurrency exchange FTX. Notably, figures like Tom Brady, Gisele Bündchen, Kevin O'Leary, and Stephen Curry were among those cleared of most charges. This decision marked a notable setback for a lawsuit brought forth by FTX investors, who claimed that these prominent individuals had deceived the public by endorsing the platform without providing adequate information. The ruling significantly narrows the scope of the legal action, impacting a wide spectrum of claims against the aforementioned individuals. For the full story, please visit the Benzinga website.
news.headline: Federal judge dismisses most claims against Tom Brady, Stephen Curry over FTX crypto endorsements, limiting lawsuit.

news.summary: Montignoso, Italy, May 8, 2025 - Il Bottaccio, Relais & Châteaux, a prestigious establishment, has been selected to be part of the SELECT Hotels & Resorts by Internova program by Internova Travel Group. This program comprises a collection of over 1,700 high-end properties offering guests exceptional amenities and services. It highlights luxurious accommodations and customized experiences for discerning travelers.
news.headline: Il Bottaccio, Relais & Châteaux in Italy joins SELECT Hotels & Resorts program with 1,700 luxury properties.

news.summary: Durango, Colorado, May 8, 2025 - The finalists for the esteemed Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Mountain West Award have been revealed by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US). This recognition program, now in its 40th year, celebrates innovative entrepreneurs who are driving the future of business in the region. The award showcases individuals who have demonstrated exceptional vision and leadership in their respective fields. Stay tuned to discover the winners who have stood out among the talented pool of finalists.
news.headline: EY US reveals John Witchel of King Energy as Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 Mountain West Award finalist. Celebrating ambitious entrepreneurs.

news.summary: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. recently received a commentary from Equity Insider News stating that in 2025, the price of gold has reached an impressive $3,400 per ounce twice; once in April and again this week. This significant increase in value raises questions about the future trends in the gold market. The news was issued from Vancouver, BC on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Gold prices hit $3,400 per ounce twice in 2025, attracting attention from smart investors. Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. in focus.

news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on May 8, 2025, the Board of Trustees of One Brooklyn Health made important leadership decisions. Dr. Sandra Scott was named Chief Executive Officer (CEO) while Mr. Arthur Gianelli was appointed President and Chief Transformation Officer at OBH. Dr. Scott brings significant experience to her new role, having previously served in...
news.headline: One Brooklyn Health appoints Dr. Sandra Scott as CEO & Mr. Arthur Gianelli as President - effective immediately.

news.summary: On Thursday, a trade deal between the United States and United Kingdom was revealed, marking it as the initial agreement aimed at resolving Trump-era tariffs. Major companies like Amazon, Google, and Meta stand to benefit from this deal. Despite maintaining a 10% tariff, the agreement spurred a positive response in the market as the S&P 500 witnessed a rally following the announcement.
news.headline: U.S.-U.K. trade deal keeps 10% tariff, S&P 500 rallies. Amazon, Google, Meta to benefit.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, the American National Standards Institute (ANSI) revealed their latest initiative to promote the widespread usage of electric vehicles (EVs) and related infrastructure in the United States. The May 2025 Gaps Progress Report was introduced to facilitate the safe integration of EVs and associated technologies. This effort aims to address key challenges and enhance standards, fostering the adoption of EVs on a national scale. By releasing this report, ANSI aims to propel the development and accessibility of EV infrastructure, contributing to the growth of sustainable transportation.
news.headline: ANSI released May 2025 Gaps Progress Report to promote safe, widespread adoption of EVs in the US.

news.summary: Today, REI Co-op marked a significant milestone as it reflects on a year of success and progress in the company. The release of its 2024 Impact Report showcased its continued growth, with a remarkable $3.53 billion in net sales for the year. In addition, the co-op invested more than $282 million in various initiatives to drive positive change. This achievement was celebrated with employees, members, and partners as they recognized the impact and forward momentum of the organization.
news.headline: REI Co-op achieves zero waste, reports $3.53 billion in net sales and invests $282 million in 2024.

news.summary: Cutting-edge technology from industry leader Peloton is revolutionizing drilling data management, offering a unified platform for well, production, and land data throughout the well lifecycle. This advancement, in collaboration with Innova, aims to optimize operations, enabling real-time decision-making. The innovation was presented in Calgary, Alberta, on May 8, 2025. This development promises to enhance efficiency and accelerate decision-making processes in the energy sector.
news.headline: PELOTON and INNOVA partner to provide real-time drilling data, optimizing operations. (Char count: 84)

news.summary: Rick Fleming is in charge of the Social Security Disability division at the Law Offices of James Scott Farrin. The firm in Durham, North Carolina, shared on April 30, 2025, that Partner Rick Fleming received recognition from the Disability Advocates Section (DAS) for his outstanding work.
news.headline: Rick Fleming of James Scott Farrin earns lifetime service award for rights of people with disabilities. Durham, N.C., April 30, 2025.

news.summary: Kevin Michel, a seasoned chef with over a decade of industry experience, is set to bring a superb culinary experience to hotel guests and local diners in Austin, Texas. Recently appointed at Hilton Austin, Chef Michel aims to offer a unique gastronomic journey by combining traditional ingredients with a variety of cooking techniques. His appointment was announced on May 8, 2025, marking an exciting new chapter for the hotel's dining scene.
news.headline: Hilton Austin appoints Kevin Michel as new Executive Chef, bringing over 10 years of experience to elevate culinary experiences.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Kung Fu Tea revealed a new collaboration to mark the upcoming live-action debut of Universal Pictures' How to Train Your Dragon. Across the nation, Kung Fu Tea outlets will be part of this partnership from May 15 to June 30, offering customers a unique experience tied to the film's release.
news.headline: Kung Fu Tea partners with Universal Pictures' How to Train Your Dragon for dragonfruit-fueled promo, May 15 to June 30.

news.summary: A new transmission line is set to be constructed in Minnesota and Wisconsin to enhance regional reliability. Dairyland Power Cooperative and GridLiance Heartland, LLC, a subsidiary of NextEra Energy Transmission, LLC, have recently made a collaborative agreement to work on this project together. The line aims to support the electricity needs of the region and ensure stable power supply. This agreement comes amidst increasing demand for electricity in the area. The project will involve investment of approximately $X million and is expected to be completed by XX.
news.headline: Dairyland & GridLiance to develop MariBell Transmission Project in MN & WI for regional reliability. May 8, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, JLL Income Property Trust, a REIT listed on NASDAQ under symbols ZIPTAX, ZIPTMX, ZIPIAX, ZIPIMX, announced their upcoming public earnings call scheduled for May 14, 2025. This REIT manages approximately $6.5 billion in portfolio equity and debt investments. The earnings call will take place at 9:00 on the specified date.
news.headline: JLL Income Property Trust to conduct Q1 2025 earnings call on May 14, 2025, managing $6.5 billion in portfolio equity.

news.summary: In an exciting announcement, the sole seaside racetrack in America has revealed its much-awaited 2025 summer season, which boasts higher winnings and an improved ticketing process with SeatGeek. Located in DEL MAR, California, the season kicks off May 8, 2025, and tickets become available for purchase starting on May 16. This year, attendees can expect enhanced entertainment and a more seamless experience at the Del Mar Thoroughbred racetrack.
news.headline: Del Mar Thoroughbred Club announces 86th summer racing season with increased purses and new ticketing experience through SeatGeek; tickets on sale May 16.

news.summary: In Taipei on May 8, 2025, EZCast, a top innovator and producer of wireless display technologies, unveils its latest product range at COMPUTEX 2025. The new lineup introduces cutting-edge features that establish fresh benchmarks in wireless connectivity, collaboration, and content delivery.
news.headline: EZCast introduces new wireless display tech at Computex 2025, setting new standards for connectivity and collaboration.
